hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'rm -rf'*|*'rm -r /'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive rm command. Use targeted deletion instead.' >&2; exit 2;; esac

case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'git push'*main*'-f'*|*'git push'*main*'--force'*|*'git push'*master*'-f'*|*'git push'*master*'--force'*) echo 'BLOCKED: Force push to main/master. Use a feature branch.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.env|*.env.*|*credentials*|*secrets*|*.pem|*.key) echo 'BLOCKED: Modifying sensitive file. Edit manually if needed.' >&2; exit 2;; esac

FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.json|*.css|*.scss|*.md) npx --yes prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true;; *.py) python3 -m ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || python3 -m black "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true;; *.go) goimports -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac

if command -v osascript &>/dev/null; then osascript -e "display notification \"$CLAUDE_NOTIFICATION\" with title \"Claude Code\""; elif command -v notify-send &>/dev/null; then notify-send 'Claude Code' "$CLAUDE_NOTIFICATION"; fi
